name: UBA : Repeat Unauthorized Access
notes: Indicates that repeat unauthorized access activities were found.
conditions_text: when UBA : Unauthorized Access match at least 7 times with the same Username in 5 minutes
thresholds: when UBA : Unauthorized Access match at least 7 times with the same Username in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Repeat Unauthorized Access on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when UBA : Unauthorized Access match at least 7 times with the same Username in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Repeat Unauthorized Access
